name: ZUK - Email Intake Agent v2 (tool-calling, TEST)

assignments.name: body
assignments.value: Guten Tag, hier Frau Berger vom Gymnasium Sankt Anna. Wir moechten Orientierungstage vom 12. bis 14. Mai mit 25 Schuelern und 2 Lehrern, achte Klasse. Ein Kind ist Vegetarier. Viele Gruesse

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "request_count": 1,
  "requests": [
    {
      "school_name": "Gymnasium Sankt Anna",
      "contact_person": "Frau Berger",
      "program_type": "Orientierungstage",
      "house": "Aktionszentrum",
      "date_range": "12.05.2027 - 14.05.2027",
      "number_of_people": "25 + 2 Lehrer",
      "grade_level": "8",
      "special_requirements": "1 Vegetarier",
      "missing_fields": "",
      "status": "ready_for_review",
      "email_type": "booking",
      "is_returning_customer": false,
      "possible_duplicate_id": null
    }
  ]
}

parameters.query: SELECT count(*)::int AS prior_inquiries, max(received_at) AS last_seen FROM inquiries WHERE school_name ILIKE '%' || {{ $fromAI('school_name', 'Name der Schule oder Gruppe') }} || '%'
SELECT id, school_name, date_range, received_at FROM inquiries WHERE school_name ILIKE '%' || {{ $fromAI('school_name', 'Name der Schule oder Gruppe') }} || '%' ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 5
